differential_diagnoses: Head and neck malignancy (e.g., Squamous cell carcinoma, Lymphoma)
Pleomorphic adenoma of the minor salivary gland
Deep neck space infection with atypical pathogen
next_steps: CT angiography of the head and neck to rule out vascular lesion or pseudoaneurysm
Biopsy (incisional or excisional) of the lesion for histopathology and immunohistochemistry
MRI of the neck for better soft tissue characterization
Serologic evaluation for systemic inflammatory diseases (e.g., ANCA, IgG4)
Consultation with interventional radiology or vascular surgery if pseudoaneurysm is identified
Avoid blind aspiration to prevent potential life-threatening hemorrhage
